deals.description: Donauinselfest is Europe’s biggest free open-air festival, held every year in Vienna, Austria 🇦🇹😍 For three days, the Danube Island turns into a giant festival with live music, food, drinks, activities, and entertainment across multiple stages 🤩🕺🏼🎶 The best part? Entry is completely FREE! 😍😁 📍 Location: Donauinsel, Vienna 📅 When: Every year in late June (this year: July 3–5) If you’re visiting Vienna this weekend, this is something you definitely shouldn’t miss! 🎉 Save this for your

deals.title: @kseniainvienna Angebot
deals.description: One of Viennas most awaited summer events has already started ✨ Film Festival at Rathausplatz, with a free photobooth, lots of food stands & movies every evening 📍Rathausplatz from July 4th - September 6th #viennaspots #viennathingstodo #whattodoinvienna #filmfestival Quelle: TikTok @kseniainvienna.

deals.title: Gratis Eintritt bei @viennabyaleksa
deals.description: 🐇 The original Dürer’s Hare is back—and you can see it for FREE this weekend! ALBERTINA is celebrating its 250th anniversary with FREE admission on July 4–5. Don’t miss the rare chance to see Dürer’s iconic Young Hare (1502), along with masterpieces by Monet, Degas, Klimt, Picasso and more. 📍 Vienna, Austria 🗓 July 4–5 #vienna #visitvienna #albertina #viennatiktok #austria Quelle: TikTok @viennabyaleksa.

deals.title: This weekend it’s Donauinselfest again
deals.description: This weekend it’s Donauinselfest again! 🎉 Europe’s largest free-entry festival is back with amazing artists, great vibes, and hundreds of thousands of visitors. Don’t let a lost phone ruin your weekend. 🔒📱 Get yours at www.peakprotect.at #Donauinselfest #Vienna #Festival #EasyProtect #PhoneSecurity Quelle: TikTok @easy.protect.eu.

deals.title: Gratis Eintritt bei @sunriseeventsbyisa
deals.description: Freut euch auf tolle Angebote von @Bellahome & Armine Damenmode bei unserem Mega Sommer Bazar diesen Sonntag den 5.7. - Eintritt ist kostenlos! 📍Perfektastr. 81, 1230 Wien 🕟12-21 Uhr PS: Verlost werden ebenfalls Gutscheine von Bella Home & Armine Damenmode Bella Home: ➡️1x 100€ Gutschein ➡️2x 50€ Gutschein Armine Damenmode: ➡️1x100€ Gutschein ➡️1x 50€ Gutschein #foryourpage #fyp #sunriseevents Quelle: TikTok @sunriseeventsbyisa.
